calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-01-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jeffrey A. Chen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Unity Pacific, Inc.
Shannon Etchegiongelhay, resident manager for Unity Pacific, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defendant Paul Alipio.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed March 14, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Unity Pacific, Inc., and against defendant PAUL ALIPIO as follows:

Plaintiff Unity Pacific, Inc. shall recover from defendant PAUL ALIPIO Rent and Per Diem damages in the sum of $4,852.00, Costs in the amount of 348.65, for a Total Judgment for plaintiff Unity Pacific, Inc. in the amount of $5,200.65.
Plaintiff Unity Pacific, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1000 Howard Street, #204, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Off Calendar
